atoms.semantic_claim: The consensus-common crate declares a tracing dependency so validation.rs can emit debug/error logs around transaction-root validation under the ritual::async target.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Capture tracing output while triggering validate_body_against_header with a transaction-root mismatch; the downstream patch expects ritual::async validation logs, while the current port has no tracing dependency or events in this crate.
atoms.notes: Destination spot-check found no tracing.workspace entry in crates/consensus/common/Cargo.toml and no matching transaction-root validation logs in the port.

summary: The downstream tracing dependency for consensus validation observability is absent from the v2.2.0 port.
notes: Dependency-only but behavior-bearing because it supports the validation logging atoms in file-0048.
